hooks.command: IN=$(cat); C="$IN"; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && C=$(printf '%s' "$IN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf '%s' "$C" | grep -qiE 'gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Linear guard: before opening this PR, confirm an associated Linear ticket exists (or create one) and that it is approved. Log all work in Linear."}}'; true
